issues.description:
## Goal
Take the existing `attendance-app/` Expo source (from [DEV-33](mention://issue/f76d10de-667b-48f8-ae1b-d3baa473fee5)) and produce a signed, sideloadable `attendance-demo-v0.1.0.apk` wired to the demo Supabase URL deployment-engineer publishes on parent [DEV-42](mention://issue/2ad5f42d-1c32-48ad-aff8-5b9c071c5db5).

## Coordination
- deployment-engineer (on [DEV-42](mention://issue/2ad5f42d-1c32-48ad-aff8-5b9c071c5db5)) will post `demo_backend_url` as a metadata key + comment as soon as it's live. **Poll that issue every 5 min** until the URL appears, then proceed.
- Do NOT block on Firebase. Set `FCM_ENABLED=false` in `.env.production` — already supported by the FCM registration module (graceful no-op).
- Do NOT block on EAS / Expo cloud. Local build only.

## Build steps
1. `git clone` or restore the attendance-app worktree (check the project resource on App Hub `09e6cfd3-d45e-4225-a494-2e3400b6983c`). If unrecoverable, regenerate the scaffold from [DEV-33](mention://issue/f76d10de-667b-48f8-ae1b-d3baa473fee5) description — the AC list is the spec.
2. Install Android SDK 34 + build-tools 34.0.0 + platform-tools via `sdkmanager` (one-off). Java 17 is on the host already.
3. `expo prebuild --platform android --clean`
4. Edit `android/app/build.gradle` to ensure `versionCode 1`, `versionName "0.1.0-demo"`, applicationId `com.newtechkw.attendance.demo` (suffix `.demo` to allow side-by-side with future prod).
5. Generate debug keystore (or use the one shipped by `expo prebuild`): `keytool -genkey -v -keystore android/app/debug.keystore -alias androiddebugkey -storepass android -keypass android -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 -dname "CN=Demo,OU=NewTech,O=NewTech,L=Kuwait,ST=KW,C=KW"`
6. `cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease` (release variant signed with debug keystore — fine for sideload).
7. Output: `android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk` → rename to `attendance-demo-v0.1.0.apk`.
8. Attach the APK to **[DEV-42](mention://issue/2ad5f42d-1c32-48ad-aff8-5b9c071c5db5)** via `multica issue comment add ... --attachment ./attendance-demo-v0.1.0.apk`.
9. Smoke test: install on Android emulator (API 34, x86_64) via `adb install -r`, launch, confirm login screen renders in RTL Arabic.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] APK file ≤ 60 MB
- [ ] `adb install` succeeds on a fresh emulator
- [ ] App launches without crash; login screen visible in Arabic RTL
- [ ] Attempting login with seeded `super_admin@diwan.demo / Demo2026!` returns a session token from the demo backend

## Self-heal
- Two `gradle assembleRelease` failures with the same error → swap to `npx eas-cli build --platform android --profile preview --local` (still local, no cloud) before escalating.
- If Android SDK install fails on this runtime, escalate to [@ceo](mention://agent/d9f942b9-e245-4e28-99eb-8f12fbebc2c3) with the exact error — we'll swap to a runtime that has it pre-installed.

## DoD
APK attached to [DEV-42](mention://issue/2ad5f42d-1c32-48ad-aff8-5b9c071c5db5) + smoke-test screenshot + status flipped to `in_review`. CEO picks it up from there and pushes to user.
issues.title: Build local debug APK from attendance-app/ — wired to DEV-42 demo backend

issues.description:
## Goal (single sentence)
Ship the user a downloadable, installable **`.apk` that runs on a clean Android device today**, backed by a self-hosted demo Supabase + stubbed FCM, so [admin@newtechkw.com](mention://member/0c06df4b-79c1-44d4-a0a0-a822d82ae6f4) can perform full UI / offline / RTL / golden-path testing without waiting for paid resources.

## Why now
User asked on [DEV-36](mention://issue/e60d5be5-b9dd-48aa-b949-28286ea80f1b) (parent comment `8f6ce1bf`) for the complete app ready for full Android testing **now**. DEV-33 is code-done, QA-gate-passed (13/13 tests), but no APK exists yet. External-credential ask is in flight in parallel; this issue is the **action path that does NOT wait on the user**.

## Inputs (already available)
- React Native Expo source from [DEV-33](mention://issue/f76d10de-667b-48f8-ae1b-d3baa473fee5) (in mobile-engineer's last worktree — re-checkout from the App Hub project `09e6cfd3-d45e-4225-a494-2e3400b6983c` if cleared)
- Schema + migrations from [DEV-31](mention://issue/89749693-1fd3-42ff-a0bd-481b3feadc76)
- Edge Functions from [DEV-32](mention://issue/bb36dbf3-e989-4e10-bf4e-f0756c5eef37)
- HR Admin Web from [DEV-34](mention://issue/3f3a89bb-3322-4f87-bd97-f6e89cf63d9b) (separate preview URL acceptable)
- Deploy plan from [DEV-39](mention://issue/b2fc5cb4-f977-421f-95be-6d9e18738b22) `DEPLOY.md` + `RUNBOOK.md`

## Expected Output
1. **`attendance-demo-v0.1.0.apk`** — debug-signed, sideloadable, installable on Android API 24+.
   - Embedded `SUPABASE_URL` + `SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` pointing at a **self-hosted Supabase instance** (Docker compose on this runtime host, exposed via Cloudflare tunnel — no paid account needed).
   - FCM stubbed (`FCM_ENABLED=false`) → notifications surface as in-app toasts; no Firebase project required.
   - Embedded demo seed: 1 tenant (شركة الديوان للتجارة), 3 offices (Kuwait City / Salmiya / Hawalli), 5 shifts, 10 employees, 1 super_admin + 2 hr_manager + 7 employees with pre-set passwords.
2. **`HOW_TO_INSTALL.ar.md`** — Kuwaiti Arabic walkthrough: enable "تطبيقات من مصادر غير معروفة", install APK, login as either `super_admin@diwan.demo / Demo2026!` or `employee01@diwan.demo / Demo2026!`, click through full golden path.
3. **Admin web preview URL** — Vercel preview (`vercel deploy` without `--prod`, free tier OK with existing account or a fresh email; if blocked, fall back to ngrok of local `pnpm dev`).
4. **Self-hosted Supabase backend URL** posted as `demo_backend_url` metadata on this issue. Must stay live ≥ 7 days for user testing.
5. **APK attached** to this issue as a file, plus a public download mirror (Cloudflare R2 / temp file.io / GitHub release on `adminnewtech` if PAT exists) for easy phone download.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] APK installs on a clean Android emulator (API 24+) without errors
- [ ] Login → Check-In (GPS happy path with seeded office geofence) → Check-Out → History → Leave Request all work end-to-end
- [ ] Offline test passes: airplane mode → punch → reconnect → syncs without duplicate
- [ ] RTL Arabic Kuwaiti layout is the default on first launch
- [ ] Admin web preview URL is reachable and HR manager seed account can log in, see today's punches, approve a leave
- [ ] `HOW_TO_INSTALL.ar.md` is genuinely Kuwaiti tone (not MSA), tested by [@arabic-rtl-experience-agent](mention://agent/7bcef3ff-a4d6-4ea3-866e-bdcc00b27576)
- [ ] No secrets in the APK, source, or any committed artifact — only demo credentials labelled as demo

## Build approach (recommended)
- **No EAS / no Expo cloud build.** Use `expo prebuild` → local `./gradlew assembleRelease` with debug keystore (`-keystore debug.keystore -keyalg RSA -keysize 2048 -validity 10000 -keypass android -storepass android -dname "CN=Demo"`). Install Android SDK 34 + build-tools 34.0.0 + platform-tools via `sdkmanager` if not present on the runtime host (one-time cost).
- **Self-hosted Supabase via `supabase/postgres` + `supabase/gotrue` + `supabase/postgrest` + `supabase/storage-api` containers**, all from the official `docker-compose` recipe. Exposed via Cloudflare tunnel (free, no card required).
- **Apply migrations from [DEV-31](mention://issue/89749693-1fd3-42ff-a0bd-481b3feadc76) and Edge Functions from [DEV-32](mention://issue/bb36dbf3-e989-4e10-bf4e-f0756c5eef37) on the self-hosted instance**, then seed with `seed.sql` (deliverable in this task).

## Dependencies
None blocking on user. All work happens on this runtime host or free-tier infra.

## Risk
- Self-hosted Supabase will not survive a runtime restart unless persisted to /opt/data — mount volumes and document the restart procedure in `RUNBOOK.md`.
- Cloudflare tunnel free tier requires a `cloudflared` daemon — if not installable, fall back to `ngrok` (also free with a temp account).
- APK signed with debug keystore CANNOT be uploaded to Play Store — that's fine, this is for sideloading only. Mark APK filename and the install guide with **"DEMO BUILD — NOT FOR PLAY STORE"**.

## Definition of Done
APK link posted as a top-level comment on **[DEV-36](mention://issue/e60d5be5-b9dd-48aa-b949-28286ea80f1b)** (the user's parent thread) with: install instructions in Kuwaiti Arabic, demo accounts list, backend URL, preview URL for admin web, a 90-second test checklist, and a known-limitations note. `pipeline_status=demo-apk-ready` pinned on DEV-25 metadata once delivered.

## Coordination
- **deployment-engineer** (assignee) owns: self-hosted Supabase + Cloudflare tunnel + seed data + admin web preview URL + APK hosting mirror.
- **mobile-engineer** (sub-task or peer dispatch): the actual APK build — `expo prebuild` → gradle assembleRelease — wired to the backend URL deployment-engineer provisions.
- Coordinate via this thread; deployment-engineer pings mobile-engineer with the backend URL as soon as it's live so the APK build can embed it.

Self-heal: if `gradle assembleRelease` fails twice with the same error on this runtime, swap to `expo-cli` cloud build (anonymous EAS) before escalating. Document the swap in `retry_log` metadata.

metadata.pipeline_status: backend-live: supabase running, tunnel up, seed complete. Waiting for APK from mobile-engineer.

issues.title: Sideloadable Demo APK + Self-hosted Demo Backend — Android Attendance App (Ready-to-test)
